subject: [PATCH 10/14] mm/pagemap: add PAGE_IS_ACCESSED for RWP tracking

2026-04-27.patch_summary: This patch adds a new category, PAGE_IS_ACCESSED, to the pagemap API for tracking read-write protection (RWP) using userfaultfd. It introduces a separate PTE bit for RWP and scopes it to the VMA that registered the mode making the bit meaningful. The patch also updates documentation and code to reflect this change, ensuring that the UAPI does not conflate write-protected and RWP-protected pages.
